occurrence_sentence: Founded by Sushanta Mitra, the Executive Director of the Waterloo Institute for Nanotechnology and a Professor in Mechanical & Mechatronics Engineering, the University of Waterloo, and Na Young Kim, a faculty member at the Institute of Quantum Computing and an Associate Professor in Electrical & Computer Engineering, the University of Waterloo who leads the Quantum Innovation (QuIN) Laboratory, Aquabits is based in Waterloo, Canada.
